title: Dense Adventurous Brazilian Skewers
description: A funky, dense, adventurous Brazilian dish featuring blackcurrant jam, smoke, and kosher-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: Blackcurrant jam
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality, artisanal jam for maximum flavor

ingredients.name: Smokey sweet potato, diced
ingredients.notes: smoke for 30 minutes using liquid smoke or a charcoal grill

ingredients.name: Brazilian-style malagueta peppers
ingredients.notes: use the seeds and membranes for intense heat

instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat, about 400°F (200°C).
Thread pork tenderloin, smokey sweet potato, red onion, cilantro, lime juice, garlic, salt, black pepper, and malagueta peppers onto skewers, leaving a small space between each ingredient.
Brush blackcurrant jam onto the pork tenderloin cubes, making sure to coat them evenly.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the pork is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Remove from heat and let rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
Chop ripe mango and serve on top of skewers.
